title: Try-On Studies
description: Three independent virtual try-on compositions testing wardrobe changes and identity-preserving presentation.
creative_direction: Independent studies for outfit transformation: each image makes identity preservation visibly testable through repeated face, body, pose, or mirror comparison structures.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: No references; each image is independent.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.
